subcodes.first_line: A remembrance of him who hath turned towards My countenance, directed himself to Mine horizon, hearkened unto My call and answered his Lord when others turned away from Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری من توجه الی وجهی و اقبل الی افقی و سمع ندائی و اجاب مولیه اذ اعرض عنه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
